languages.text: Огромные кольца разных оттенков медленно проплывают мимо стрельчатых окон капитанского мостика.
Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.
languages.original_text: Огромные кольца разных оттенков медленно проплывают мимо стрельчатых окон капитанского мостика.

traits.locale_text: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.

languages.text: 船長のブリッジの細長い窓をゆっくりと漂う、様々な色の巨大なリング。
languages.original_text: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.

traits.locale_text: 船長のブリッジの細長い窓をゆっくりと漂う、様々な色の巨大なリング。

languages.text: Colosales anillos de diversos tonos flotan lentamente junto a las ventanas del puente.
languages.original_text: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.

traits.locale_text: Colosales anillos de diversos tonos flotan lentamente junto a las ventanas del puente.

languages.text: 巨大的星环泛着各色辉光，缓缓滑过舰桥的尖拱窗外。
languages.original_text: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.

traits.locale_text: 巨大的星环泛着各色辉光，缓缓滑过舰桥的尖拱窗外。

languages.text: Riesige Ringe unterschiedlicher Färbung treiben langsam an den Lazettfenstern der Kapitänsbrücke vorbei.
languages.original_text: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.

traits.locale_text: Riesige Ringe unterschiedlicher Färbung treiben langsam an den Lazettfenstern der Kapitänsbrücke vorbei.

languages.text: Çeşitli renklerdeki devasa halkalar, kaptan köprüsünün sivri kemerli pencerelerinin önünden yavaşça süzülüyor.
languages.original_text: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.

traits.locale_text: Çeşitli renklerdeki devasa halkalar, kaptan köprüsünün sivri kemerli pencerelerinin önünden yavaşça süzülüyor.

languages.text: D'énormes anneaux aux teintes variées dérivent lentement devant la baie de la passerelle de commandement.
